mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, AUTHOR_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM SAMPLE_BOARD WHERE DELETED = FALSE
AND AUTHOR_ID = #{authorId}
AND TITLE LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
ORDER BY BOARD_ID DESC
SELECT BOARD_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, AUTHOR_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM SAMPLE_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETED = FALSE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SAMPLE_BOARD (TITLE, CONTENT, AUTHOR_ID, VIEW_COUNT, CREATED_AT) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId},
#{viewCount} 0 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE SAMPLE_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DELETED = FALSE
UPDATE SAMPLE_BOARD SET DELETED = TRUE, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
